2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX
22 - 24 May 2026
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 78
Date 23 May 2026
Time 19:18
Title Qualifying Deleted Lap Times
Description Qualifying Deleted Lap Times
Enclosed CAN DOC 78 - Qualifying Deleted Lap Times .pdf
Garry Connelly Tanja Geilhausen
Pedro Lamy Marcel Demers

 
 
 
2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX 
22 – 24 May 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 78 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  23 May 2026 
 
        Time  19:18 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Qualifying 
  
Fact The F1 cars below did not use the track at turns 1, 4, 8 and 14.
